title: From Seattle: Boeing Factory and Future of Flight Tour | GetYourGuide
content: # From Seattle: Boeing Factory and Future of Flight Tour. Learn more about flight on a tour of the Boeing Factory 25 miles north of Seattle. Hear stories about Boeing and its founder, and learn what the future holds at the Future of Flight Aviation Center. *   5 5 out of 5 stars  E Emilija – United States June 28, 2026 - Verified booking  Shawn was a great guide! 5 5 out of 5 stars  M Michael – United States June 11, 2026 - Verified booking  Shawn was both knowledgeable and entertaining at the same time. title: The visitor center is inside the Boeing Tour building - Tripadvisor
content: There are quite a few brochures to local travel places. There is also a café and two gift shops - one with Seattle-theme items, one with Boeing-theme items.

title: Which to visit in Seattle: Boeing factory or Museum of Flight?
content: I did the Boeing factory many years ago. It was fantastic. The tour is 80 minutes but there's also a fairly large static display. 46w.
